_comment_mode: Optional. 'local' uses mitmproxy --mode local:<name> (scoped spawn — no system proxy, no Steam Launch Options). 'regular' binds listen_port and expects the client to set HTTP_PROXY. When omitted, the loader picks a platform-aware default: 'local' on Windows (recommended — see CLAUDE.md), 'regular' on Linux/macOS. When mode='local', local_process_name is required.
_comment_box_ids: Box itemIds verified from capture 2026-06-28: 910801=Normal Box, 920801=Stage Boss Box, 930901=Act Boss Box. Previous default (910901/920901) was WRONG and never matched.
_comment_suffix: CRITICAL: the client validator checks the last 3 digits of rewardItemId (rarity*100+tier). Pick replacements whose last-3 MATCHES the box's original reward suffix, or the client ships TamperedItemIdDetected. See docs/analysis/tbh-network-forensics.md §10.8+§10.12. Normal Box pool is suffix-heavy on 171; Stage Boss Box on 004. For full evasion rewrite pendingTx.tid too (Strategy B, §10.12).
_comment_rewrite_pending_tx: Strategy B: when true, also rewrites pendingTx.gid + .tid in SteamItemInfo/mine responses to match the rewritten rewardItemId. Eliminates TamperedItemIdDetected for cross-suffix swaps. Optional — loader picks a platform-aware default when this field is omitted: ON on Windows (pairs with default mode=local for a working out-of-the-box setup), OFF on Linux/macOS (historic conservative default; flip explicitly after testing).
